client.name: Dominic Monkhouse
client.location_base: New Forest / Wiltshire, UK (90 mins from London)
notable_background: Scaled tech businesses (e.g., hosting companies) prior to coaching
Author of 'Plan B: How to Scale Your Technology Business Faster and More Sustainably'

company.name: Monkhouse & Company
company.positioning: Scale-up coaching for founder-CEOs who are stuck in 'No Man’s Land'—high growth, rising complexity, leadership bottlenecks.

offerings.name: Premium Leadership Team Program
offerings.summary: CEO + leadership team do a two-day kickoff at the Farm, quarterly off-sites, and coaching between sessions.
offerings.ideal_fit: Scale-ups ~50–100+ headcount needing operating system and leadership cadence

offerings.name: 1:1 CEO Coaching
offerings.summary: Direct coaching for founder-CEOs of smaller or venture-backed companies.
offerings.note: Time-limited—capacity constraints led to cohort development.

offerings.name: Cohort Program (New)
offerings.summary: Group for founder-CEOs to learn frameworks, reclaim time, and scale with peer support.
offerings.goal_outcome: Move CEO from firefighting to strategic focus using core playbooks.

frameworks.name: Seven-Stage Founder’s Curve
frameworks.purpose: Diagnose stage, especially 'Frustration' and 'No Man’s Land' inflection.
key_markers: Startup → Investment → Lift Off → Validation → Frustration → No Man’s Land → Future (growth/decline)

frameworks.name: Two-Day-a-Week CEO Blueprint
frameworks.purpose: Reduce operational drag; shift CEO to high-ROI strategic work.
frameworks.outcome: From 7 days firefighting to 2 days running ops, 3 days on uniquely-CEO work.

icp.region_priority: UK (London/South East focus); international clients welcome if willing to travel to the Farm

firmographics.stage: Post-PMF, rapid growth, hitting organisational complexity

pain_points: CEO burnout: 7 days/week, 14-hour days, constant firefighting
Leadership gaps: weak or missing exec team; hiring/onboarding not systematised
What worked before now stalls; strategy execution slows
Operational chaos: crisis management in short bursts; margins/quality at risk
psychographics: Hands-on, scrappy builders struggling to let go
Outcome-driven, value clear frameworks and peer learning
Ready to invest for time back, clarity, and scalable systems
buying_triggers: Growth plateaus or wheels starting to come off
Major life pressure (family/time), risk of burnout/divorce
Need to prepare for funding, new markets, or exit
negative_signals: Unwillingness to delegate or adopt cadence/operating system
Seeking vanity metrics over operational change

business_outcomes: Reclaim CEO time for strategy, partnerships, and category leadership
Build/upgrade leadership team and operating cadence
Sustain growth through next S-curve (beyond ~100 headcount)
marketing_outcomes: Audience growth around Dominic’s thought leadership (not just guests)
Increase qualified inbound leading to booked calls and engagements
Launch and fill the new cohort program

linkedin.action: Pruning connections to concentrate on ICP; guests shifting to UK founders

podcast.title: The Melting Pot
podcast.guest_strategy: Refocused on UK founders of scale-ups to mirror ICP
podcast.distribution_note: Align podcast release with newsletter send for 48-hour lift

content_beliefs: Bingers are buyers—content binge precedes high-ticket inbound
Niche views may be lower but conversion potential is high

conversion_assets_and_ctas.secondary_cta: Download free PDF of 'Plan B' → offer physical book → nurture to call
conversion_assets_and_ctas.future_cta: Cohort waitlist/sign-ups once program page is live
planned_video_assets: 15-minute VSL explaining the Two-Day-a-Week CEO Blueprint

creative_plan.long_form: Bi-weekly thought-leadership videos (initially 2/month) with structured talking points; Nalu to produce, edit, and package
creative_plan.short_form: Dedicated shorts from long-form + bespoke scripts/hooks for LinkedIn/YouTube/ads
creative_plan.distribution: Scheduling + copywriting across channels; build owned audience

paid_media.approach: Use shorts/long-form as ad creative for awareness and direct response
paid_media.ops: Run via Nalu ad accounts where practical; connect to YouTube for Google Ads

content_kpis: View-through rate and avg. view duration (YouTube)
funnel_kpis: Call-to-client close rate (historically ~50% on inbound per Dominic)

proof_points_examples: DataBarracks: LinkedIn → site → book purchase → podcast binge → closed ~£150k
Unforgettable Travel: ~80 staff; CEO working 7 days; seeking time back and stability
FX Digital: Leadership team now runs off-sites; CEO focuses on future (Barcelona office, US, large deals)

logistics_preferences.offsite: The Farm (New Forest) for proper off-site environment
logistics_preferences.travel_scope: Prefers London/South East; international clients fly in
recording_setup: Simpler, calmer background for solo thought-leadership videos (minimise busy bookshelf look)
Option to reconfigure studio room; Nalu to advise on framing, lighting, and set dressing

operations_stack.newsletter: Internal ESP (weekly cadence; expanding to personal notes)
operations_stack.ads_access: Prefer Google Ads connection to YouTube via Nalu

open_actions: Grant Nalu access to YouTube channel (instructions to be sent)
Complete Google Ads ↔ YouTube consent/connection form
Share brand assets (logos, colours, guidelines) via Google Drive/Doc
Confirm weekly call slot (prefer early week)
Approve example styles: shorts, long-form, VSL

messaging_notes.core_narrative: From exhausted operator to strategic leader—install the operating system that gives you time back and unlocks the next S-curve.
common_objections_to_handle: Preference for DIY experimentation over proven playbooks
